subject: Science Centre Trip Final Payment
body: The Science Centre trip will take place on 26 March from 08:30 to 16:00. Final payment must be made by 18 March.
gold_summary: Science Centre trip on 26 March; final payment due by 18 March.

subject: Attendance Confirmation Needed
body: The attendance review meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 15:45. Please confirm by 12:00 tomorrow if you are able to attend.
gold_summary: Attendance review meeting on 10 March; confirm by 10 March.

subject: Netball Training Update
body: This is a reminder that netball training will go ahead on 21 March at 10:00. The session will still run even if the weather is cold, and pupils should arrive a few minutes early because the sports hall doors will be locked once practice begins. Please attend if your child is available.
gold_summary: Netball training on 21 March; attendance required.

subject: Place Confirmation for Workshop
body: Your child's place on the creative workshop can only be secured once the contribution has been received by 22 March.
gold_summary: Workshop payment is due by 22 March.

subject: Choir Rehearsal Change
body: Due to a hall booking issue, choir rehearsal planned for tomorrow has been cancelled.
gold_summary: Choir rehearsal on 11 March has been cancelled.

subject: Geography Field Trip Reminder
body: The geography field trip will take place on 28 March from 09:00 to 14:30. Please bring a packed lunch and return the final information slip by 20 March.
gold_summary: Geography field trip on 28 March; bring a packed lunch.

subject: Curriculum Information Evening Form
body: Curriculum Information Evening will be held on 25 March at 18:00. Please submit the attendance form by 17 March.
gold_summary: Curriculum Information Evening on 25 March; submit form by 17 March.

subject: Chess Club Place Confirmation
body: Chess club will run on 29 March in Room 14. Please reply by 24 March if your child would like to attend.
gold_summary: Chess club on 29 March; reply by 24 March to confirm.
